stt-async-v4.description: Async v4 — diarized asynchronous transcription with token timestamps
stt-async-v4.pricingNotes: Soniox async speech-to-text is estimated at $0.10/hour. Free plan usage, subscriptions, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Soniox's Files API documents a maximum uploaded file size of 524288000 bytes. Async docs separately cap file duration at 300 minutes. The transcription API also accepts audio_url, but no explicit remote URL size cap is currently published.
